Headline: Golden Gate delivers gold, tungsten results for Resolution Minerals
Summary: Resolution Minerals Ltd CEO US Operations Craig Lindsay talked with Proactive about final assay results from the company’s 2025 drilling campaign at the 100%-owned Horse Heaven Gold–Antimony–Tungsten–Silver Project in Idaho, USA. The results come from the Golden Gate Fault Zone, where the company has reported further broad gold intersections and a significant tungsten hit. Lindsay explained that the 2025 program totalled 14 holes and more than 10,000 feet of drilling, delivering multiple gold discoveries across the Golden Gate target area. He highlighted broad intercepts beginning at surface, including previously reported results such as 253 metres at 1.5 g/t gold and 189 metres at 1.3 g/t gold. According to Lindsay, “almost everything that we drilled this year ended in open-ended mineralisation at depth,” pointing to strong expansion potential.
